title: Angélique
writer: Anne Golon, Serge Golon, Claude Brulé
actors: Michèle Mercier, Robert Hossein, Jean Rochefort
plot: In the first of the Angélique series, the beautiful feisty teenage heroine becomes entangled in a political assassination plot and is betrothed to a stranger who is twelve years her senior and a reputed sorcerer.
